lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All mechanical components are in perfect working order and the vehicle has been maintained to the highest standard.
Mint condition.

Step into luxury with this absolutely pristine vehicle! It is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards. From the flawless exterior to the like-new interior, every detail shines. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a top-tier driving experience. Truly a gem!
The vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically reliable and functions as intended. The interior and exterior show minor signs of wear from normal use.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint retains a high gloss, though there are a few minor rock chips on the front bumper and a small door ding consistent with regular use. Inside, the interior is clean and smoke-free, with all electronics, climate control, and features functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is solid; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts without hesitation, and there are no known leaks or warning lights. It serves as a reliable and comfortable daily driver that is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior paint has lost some of its original luster, with noticeable fading on the roof and hood, as well as several small door dings and a scuff on the rear passenger-side bumper. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows significant wear on the driver's seat bolster and some light staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably for daily commuting, though the engine has a minor oil seep and the suspension feels somewhat loose, suggesting that new struts may be needed in the near future. It is a functional, roadworthy vehicle that would benefit from some cosmetic and mechanical attention.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This model has been meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a clean interior and a well-preserved exterior, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning owner. We invite you to experience the caliber of this exceptional offering firsthand.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved over the years. Whether you're commuting or heading out for a weekend getaway, this car is ready to hit the road with you! It runs like a dream and is just waiting for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and linear power delivery. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain provides an engaging analog experience. The chassis remains taut with upgraded Bilstein dampers and a reinforced rear subframe, addressing the platform's known structural requirements. Maintenance is up to date, including a recent VANOS system overhaul and valve adjustment to ensure the valvetrain operates within factory tolerances. While the exterior displays minor stone chips consistent with spirited use, the mechanical vitals are robust, and the limited-slip differential provides excellent exit traction. A mechanically sound specimen ready for the open road.
Reliable used car. Good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean interior. Mechanically sound.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and pride of ownership. The exterior maintains a glossy finish that catches the light beautifully, showing only minor, expected signs of careful road use like small stone chips. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the seating surfaces are firm and well-preserved, while every button, dial, and digital display functions perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, a testament to its consistent maintenance history and recent full service. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a comfortable, composed ride. With plenty of tread remaining on the tires and a comprehensive service record included, this car is ready for its next chapter and offers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been meticulously maintained, ensuring consistent performance and a refined driving experience. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust drivetrain, it represents a superior balance of value and quality for the discerning motorist. This offering stands as a testament to diligent ownership and enduring engineering, ready for immediate acquisition.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver, offering a harmonious balance of performance and long-term reliability. Each component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure operational excellence, presenting a sophisticated aesthetic and a robust mechanical profile that reflects a high standard of care and quality craftsmanship.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me—perfect for someone who wants a dependable ride that still looks great on the road. It’s been well-loved and well-maintained, so it's ready to hit the pavement for its next big adventure. I’ve taken great care of it, and I know you’re going to love it as much as I have! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS for precise throttle response. The drivetrain consists of a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission paired with a torque-sensing M-Variable
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Mechanically sound.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with everyday comfort. The exterior retains a beautiful luster, with the original paint holding a deep shine, though close inspection will reveal minor, age-appropriate stone chips on the front fascia. The body panels are straight, and the alloy wheels are free of significant curb rash. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery shows only light softening on the driver’s side bolster, and all interior plastics and wood trim remain vibrant and crack-free. Every tech feature, including the responsive infotainment system and the dual-zone climate control, operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts crisply, backed by a consistent service history. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil service, a cooling system flush, and a brake pad replacement. The tires have roughly 75% tread remaining, ensuring this car is road-trip ready. It offers a tight, quiet ride that reflects its careful ownership history.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it adheres to our rigorous standards for safety and roadworthiness. An ideal acquisition for the discerning professional seeking a high-caliber driving experience at a compelling valuation.

We are pleased to offer this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and long-term reliability. Demonstrating superior mechanical integrity and a well-preserved interior, this automobile has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our high standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic appeal. A sophisticated choice for the professional driver who demands excellence and value.

Hey there! 👋 I’m looking to find a new home for my awesome ride! It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super reliable for me. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road with you today. You’re going to love how it drives! Let me know if you want to come take it for a spin! 🚗✨

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s high-revving S54 platform. Featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system, the 3.2L atmospheric straight-six delivers linear power up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including subframe reinforcement and a refreshed cooling system. The suspension geometry remains tight with upgraded polyurethane bushings, ensuring the chassis maintains its legendary handling precision. This is a driver-focused machine with excellent mechanical compression and crisp throttle response.
Good condition. Clean title. Full service history. Reliable daily driver. Minor interior wear.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and practicality. The exterior paint retains a deep shine, showing only minor, expected signs of road use that are consistent with its history. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring premium materials that have been cared for diligently. All electronic components, including the climate control and navigation system, function exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine remains strong and responsive, backed by a consistent maintenance record and a recent multi-point inspection. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the suspension provides a smooth, quiet ride. This is a dependable car that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter on the road.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a refined balance of performance and proven reliability. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, this unit exhibits a high level of mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation consistent with rigorous ownership standards. It offers a sophisticated driving experience, backed by a documented history of consistent service and professional care.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and sustained performance. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring it meets our rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness. An exceptional value proposition for those seeking a balance of luxury and dependability.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's ready for its next adventure? This beauty has been so well-loved and is still in wonderful shape. It runs like a dream and looks fantastic parked in the driveway. It's been a joy to own, and I'm sure you'll love it just as much as I have. Come see it for yourself and take it for a spin!

This high-revving unit utilizes individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system to deliver linear power up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 420G 6-
Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in excellent mechanical shape, ready for its next owner. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only the minor, expected signs of careful road use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully functional electronics. It offers a smooth, responsive driving experience that bridges the gap between everyday reliability and premium comfort.
